_comment: test-driven — enforces test coverage and runs tests automatically on every relevant change.
automationSystemPrompt: Automation bot. Drop articles/filler. Fragments OK. Abbreviate: DB/auth/config/req/res/fn. X→Y arrows. ≤5 lines. No preamble. Call tools → report results only.

onFileSave.prompt: {{file}} saved. getDiagnostics → errors. runTests (filtered to file). No test file → generateTests scaffold. Report: error count, pass/fail, coverage note.

onDiagnosticsCleared.prompt: {{file}} error cleared. runTests → confirm fix correct, no regressions.

onBranchCheckout.prompt: →{{branch}} (from {{previousBranch}}). getDiagnostics + runTests → branch, error count, pass/fail. ≤5 lines.

onCompaction.prompt: Compacted. getGitStatus + getDiagnostics + getHandoffNote. Drop articles/filler. Fragments OK. Abbreviate (DB/auth/config/req/res/fn). Stay terse. ≤8 lines.
